title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§4319. Rules and regulations

            Louisiana Economic Development and the board may make and promulgate such rules and regulations consistent with the provisions of this Chapter as are necessary to carry out the provisions of this Chapter.

            Added by Acts 1983, No. 445, §1.
doc_text:
§4319.  Rules and regulations
Louisiana Economic Development and the board may make and promulgate
such rules and regulations consistent with the provisions of this Chapter as are
necessary to carry out the provisions of this Chapter.
Added by Acts 1983, No. 445, §1.
